## Summary

Provide a short and clear description of the issue.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click on ...
3. Observe ...

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Environment

- OS:
- Browser:
- Bun version:
- Branch/commit:

## Logs and screenshots

Add relevant logs, stack traces, and screenshots if available.

## Additional context

Anything else that may help reproduce or debug the issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this report.
- [ ] I included clear reproduction steps.
- [ ] I included relevant logs/screenshots where possible.
